title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: Google Cloud Tech livestream demonstrating the Agent Development Kit (ADK) for coding agents to play text adventure games. The session featured Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar discussing practical agent development and game-playing capabilities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream demonstrates the Agent Development Kit (ADK) by building agents that play text adventure games. Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar walk through practical agent development, covering how ADK supports coding agents and orchestration. The text adventure framing gives a concrete test case for agent reasoning and decision-making.
